title: OP Tab
description: Adds a creative mode tab for items that are normally obtainable via /give.
body: Adds a creative mode tab for items that are normally obtainable via /give. Menu: This includes items that have enchantments at level 127 and unstackable items stacked to 64. Items that have enchantments at level 127: Unstackable items stacked to 64 (incompatible with 1.19.3):
